package com.example.service;

import java.io.File;
import java.io.FileInputStream;
import java.io.FileOutputStream;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.nio.file.Paths;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.zip.ZipEntry;
import java.util.zip.ZipInputStream;

/**
 * ZIP file extraction service with security fixes to prevent path traversal (Zip Slip)
 * Provides safe ZIP file extraction functionality while maintaining compatibility with Java standard libraries
 */
public class ZipService {
    
    /**
     * Extracts a ZIP file to the specified target path, returning a list of extracted files.
     * Prevents path traversal attacks and ensures all operations stay within the target directory.
     * 
     * @param zipFilePath Path to the ZIP file
     * @param extractPath Target extraction path
     * @return List of absolute paths of extracted files
     */
    public List<String> extractZipFile(String zipFilePath, String extractPath) {
        List<String> extractedFiles = new ArrayList<>();
        
        // Validate ZIP file existence first
        File zipFile = new File(zipFilePath);
        if (!zipFile.exists() || !zipFile.isFile()) {
            System.err.println("Error: ZIP file not found or is not a valid file: " + zipFilePath);
            return extractedFiles;
        }
        
        try {
            // Get canonical extract directory to resolve symlinks and relative paths
            File extractDir = new File(extractPath).getCanonicalFile();
            Path extractDirPath = extractDir.toPath();
            
            // Create extract directory if it doesn't exist
            if (!extractDir.exists()) {
                if (!extractDir.mkdirs()) {
                    System.err.println("Error: Failed to create extract directory: " + extractPath);
                    return extractedFiles;
                }
            }
            
            try (ZipInputStream zipInputStream = new ZipInputStream(new FileInputStream(zipFile))) {
                ZipEntry entry;
                while ((entry = zipInputStream.getNextEntry()) != null) {
                    try {
                        // Skip symbolic link entries to prevent potential path traversal via symlinks
                        if (entry.isSymbolicLink()) {
                            System.err.println("Skipping symbolic link entry: " + entry.getName());
                            continue;
                        }
                        
                        // Normalize entry name: replace backslashes with forward slashes (ZIP standard)
                        String entryName = entry.getName().replace('\\', '/');
                        // Normalize path to remove ../ or ./ segments
                        Path entryPath = Paths.get(entryName).normalize();
                        
                        // Block malicious entries: absolute paths or parent traversal attempts
                        if (entryPath.isAbsolute() || entryPath.startsWith("..")) {
                            System.err.println("Skipping malicious entry: " + entry.getName());
                            continue;
                        }
                        
                        // Resolve target path against extract directory
                        Path targetPath = extractDirPath.resolve(entryPath).normalize();
                        
                        // Final check: ensure target path is strictly within the extract directory
                        if (!targetPath.startsWith(extractDirPath)) {
                            System.err.println("Skipping entry outside target directory: " + entry.getName());
                            continue;
                        }
                        
                        File targetFile = targetPath.toFile();
                        
                        if (entry.isDirectory()) {
                            // Create directory if it doesn't exist
                            if (!targetFile.exists()) {
                                if (!targetFile.mkdirs()) {
                                    System.err.println("Error: Failed to create directory: " + targetFile.getAbsolutePath());
                                    continue;
                                }
                            }
                        } else {
                            // Create parent directories if necessary (safe since we validated path)
                            File parentDir = targetFile.getParentFile();
                            if (parentDir != null && !parentDir.exists()) {
                                if (!parentDir.mkdirs()) {
                                    System.err.println("Error: Failed to create parent directory: " + parentDir.getAbsolutePath());
                                    continue;
                                }
                            }
                            
                            // Write file content to target path
                            try (FileOutputStream fos = new FileOutputStream(targetFile)) {
                                byte[] buffer = new byte[4096]; // Larger buffer for better performance
                                int bytesRead;
                                while ((bytesRead = zipInputStream.read(buffer)) != -1) {
                                    fos.write(buffer, 0, bytesRead);
                                }
                            }
                            
                            // Add absolute path of extracted file to result list
                            extractedFiles.add(targetFile.getAbsolutePath());
                        }
                    } catch (IOException e) {
                        System.err.println("Error processing entry: " + entry.getName());
                        e.printStackTrace();
                    } finally {
                        // Ensure entry is closed even if processing fails
                        zipInputStream.closeEntry();
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            System.err.println("Error during ZIP extraction:");
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        
        return extractedFiles;
    }
}
